content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Rian Johnson Headshot.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Rian Johnson]] was born in December 1973]]

A list of events in '''1973''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – [[Rebecca Jackson Mendoza]] is born.
*[[January 8|08]] – [[Tommy Lee Edwards]] is born.
*[[January 19|19]] – [[Nash Edgerton]] is born.
*[[January 27|27]] – [[Chris Sotomayor]] is born.
*[[January 28|28]] – [[Jason Aaron]] is born.
*[[January 31|31]] – [[Christian Simpson]] is born.
*?? – [[George Lucas]] begins writing [[Journal of the Whills, Part I]].<ref name="Year by Year">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''</ref><ref name="Archives">[[The Star Wars Archives: Episodes IV–VI, 1977–1983]]</ref>

==February==
*[[February 7|07]] – [[Arif S. Kinchen]] is born.
*[[February 12|12]] – [[Tara Strong]] is born.
*[[February 21|21]] – [[Christopher Yost]] is born.
*[[February 22|22]] – [[Hadley Kay]] is born.

==March==
*[[March 24|24]] – [[Matthew Sloan]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 2|02]] – [[Simon Farnaby]] is born.
*[[April 6|06]] – [[Cindy Robinson]] is born.
*[[April 12|12]] – [[Mark Brooks]] is born.
*[[April 17|17]] – [[George Lucas]] begins writing a story treatment called "The Star Wars."
*[[April 18|18]] – [[Cavan Scott]] is born.
*[[April 24|24]] – [[Damon Lindelof]] is born.
*[[April 29|29]] – [[Fares Fares]] is born.

==May==
*[[May 16|16]] – [[Adam Rex]] is born.
*[[May 30|30]] – [[Chris Reiff]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 2|02]] – [[Kevin Feige]] is born.
*[[June 15|15]] – [[Neil Patrick Harris]] is born.
*[[June 18|18]] – [[Rick Famuyiwa]] is born.

==July==
*[[July 25|25]] – [[Mur Lafferty]] is born.

==August==
*[[August 2|02]] – [[Simon Kinberg]] is born.
*[[August 5|05]] – [[Paul Kasey]] is born.
*[[August 9|09]] – [[Kevin McKidd]] is born.
*[[August 12|12]] – [[Jennifer Seiden Schoonover]] is born.
*[[August 17|17]] – [[Rae Carson]] is born.
*[[August 19|19]] – [[Ahmed Best]] is born.
*19 – [[Nina Fallon]] is born.
*[[August 24|24]] – [[Grey Griffin]] is born.
*[[August 28|28]] – [[Kirby Morrow]] is born.
*[[August 29|29]] – [[Jason Spisak]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 9|09]] – [[Brian Dobson]] is born.
*[[September 12|12]] – [[Darren Morfitt]] is born.
*[[September 20|20]] – [[Tom Root]] is born.

==October==
*[[October 5|05]] – [[Pop Mhan]] is born.
*[[October 30|30]] – [[Simon Lowe]] is born.

==November==
*[[November 9|09]] – [[Alyson Court]] is born.
*[[November 14|14]] – [[Dana Snyder]] is born.

==December==
*[[December 17|17]] – [[Rian Johnson]] is born.

==Unknown==
*[[Brett Northcutt]] is born.
*[[Matt Kindt]] is born.
*[[Andrea Mutti]] is born.
*[[Jason Felix]] is born.
*[[London Voices]] is founded.

==Sources==
*''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''
*[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle (updated edition)|''Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle'' (updated edition)]]
*''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]''
*''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''

==Notes and references==
